page_metadata.biotools__summary:
Attention-based graph neural network for predicting stability of compounds in human plasma.
PredPS predicts plasma stability for a given compound as stable (≥ 85% remaining at 3 h) or unstable (< 85% remaining at 3 h) in human plasma.
